name: Working Bikes
description: Working Bikes is a non-profit that takes donated bikes and refurbishes them, giving them a new life. They carry a wide range of used and refurbished bicycles.

name: Offbeat Bikes
description: Offbeat Bikes is an independent cargo and electric bike shop in Logan Square. We specialize in bikes for everyday life, whether it's kids, groceries, a breezy commute, or a joyride by the lake. Offering new bike sales, expert service, short and long-term rentals, used bike marketplace, European-inspired accessories, and the friendliest team you'll find anywhere.

name: Ciclo Urbano
description: Ciclo Urbano is the full service sales shop of non-profit community bike organization West Town Bikes. We carry new and used bikes, parts & accessories and service all makes and models of bikes.

name: Wheelie Good Bikes
description: Wheelie Good Bikes is your Rogers Park home for new and used bikes, quality repairs, and the kind of knowledgeable, friendly service that gets more people riding.

name: J.C. Lind
description: J.C. Lind Bike Co. promotes cycling as a means of transportation and a way of life by selling practical, high-quality city bikes.
